About Us

Engineering a
Greener Bangalore

Ventilation · Air Purification · Electrical Solutions

Our Story

Who We Are

Ecoelite Engineers is a Bengaluru-based engineering firm specialising in ventilation, air purification and electrical panel solutions for commercial and industrial facilities. With over a decade of on-the-ground experience, we supply and install ventilation fans, electrostatic air cleaners and electrical panels for a wide range of commercial and industrial clients.

Our team brings deep technical knowledge to every project — from selecting the right fan size for a basement car park to designing AHU control panels for large commercial buildings. We pride ourselves on honest advice, reliable installation and attentive after-sales support.

Our ServicesGet in Touch

Why Choose Us

The EcoeliteAdvantage

01

Energy Efficient by Design

Our systems are engineered to consume up to 40% less energy than conventional alternatives — delivering substantial cost savings and a reduced carbon footprint.

02

Precision Engineering

Every product is sourced, validated and installed to the highest standards, backed by advanced technical specifications and real-world performance data from our trusted manufacturing partners.

03

Trusted Supply Chain

We partner exclusively with established manufacturers for ventilation, air purification and electrical panels — ensuring product quality, spares availability and full warranty coverage on every installation.

04

End-to-End Service

From site survey and product selection through to installation, commissioning and after-sales support — we handle the entire project lifecycle so you have a single point of accountability.

Ready to StartYour Project?

Talk to our team today. We'll assess your requirements and recommend the right solution.
